title: Faster, Smoother, More Reliable
description: We've supercharged RPLY with major performance improvements that make the app load faster and feel more responsive. This release also brings new statistics to help you understand your messaging habits, plus dozens of fixes to make your experience more stable and reliable.
features: New statistics dashboard shows your messaging patterns and time saved
Scheduled messages now include more options and improvements
Group chat messages now display contact names for easier conversation tracking
Clickable links in messages make it easy to open websites directly
Improved onboarding flow with restore tutorial for returning users
fixes: Fixed long loading times when opening the app
Resolved issue where chats wouldn't appear in some cases
Fixed missing chat threads so all your conversations stay visible
Improved search panel animations and stability
Fixed "Launch at Login" toggle to properly reflect changes
Fixed floating window to stop typing when switching conversations
Improved AI reply generation for new users with fewer conversations
Fixed potential crashes when searching messages
Smoother streaming responses with better character timing
